name: GitHub CLI
description: Baseline governance rules for GitHub CLI workflows, merges, and secrets.

rules.name: GitHub Read Operations
rules.description: Read-oriented gh commands stay low risk.

rules.name: GitHub Medium Mutations
rules.description: PR creation and issue closure require approval.

rules.name: GitHub High-Risk Mutations
rules.description: Workflow runs, merges, and secrets are high risk.

rules.name: Wrap Workflow and Secret Commands
rules.description: Force workflow dispatch and secret changes through wrapper mode.
